## Adeptus Custodes

![][image1]  
Adeptus Custodes Special Rules  
**Endeavors.** During a campaign, when you create your Warband, also begin a new Endeavor. To do so, determine 3 of the following Imperatives at random, in order, rerolling duplicates. You must complete those Imperatives, in the order they were generated, one during each battle.

* **1: Emperor’s Domain.** End the battle with more friendly models than enemy models in your own deployment zone.  
* **2: Wrath of the Emperor.** Take at least four enemy models Out of Action before the end of the third Turn during this battle.  
* **3: Make an Example.** Win the battle.  
* **4: Vital Targets.** Take at least three enemy Elite models Out of Action during this battle. If the enemy has fewer than three Elites, take all of them Out of Action instead.  
* **5: Shadowed Directive.** Keep all of your models from being taken Out of Action during the first two Turns of the battle.  
* **6: Absolute Mastery.** Score at least two Glorious Deeds during the battle.  
* **7: Shadow of the Throne.** At the end of the battle, have more of your models within 12” of the center of the battlefield than there are enemy models.  
* **8: Martial Supremacy.** During this battle, take at least two enemy models Out of Action for every one of your own that is taken Out of Action (if none of your models are taken Out of Action, you automatically succeed).  
* **9: Alpha Threat Confirmed.** Take the enemy Warband leader Out of Action during the battle.  
* **10: Annihilation.** Take every enemy model Out of Action, or win via the enemy failing a Morale Test.  
* **11: Emperor’s Will Be Done.** End the battle with more friendly models than enemy models in the enemy’s deployment zone.  
* **12: Inspirational Example.** Take at least four enemy models Out of Action with melee attacks during this battle.

If you complete all three of an Endeavor’s Imperatives, you gain an Endeavor Reward and generate a new Endeavor. If you fail to complete an Imperative during a battle, you suffer Dishonor and generate a new Endeavor. You can also choose to abandon an Endeavor and generate a new one if you have completed at least one of its Imperatives, in which case, if you completed two Imperatives, you still receive an Endeavor Reward, chosen at random. If you completed only one, there is no benefit or penalty.

*Endeavor Rewards*  
Choose a Reward from the following options if you completed an Endeavor. Choose a Reward at random instead if you abandoned an Endeavor after completing only two Imperatives.

* **1\.** You earn 2 Glory.  
* **2\.** You roll an additional Promotion die after this and every battle for the rest of the campaign. This benefit stacks.  
* **3\.** Each of your Elite models gains 1 XP.  
* **4\.** One of your Elite models gains 2 XP.  
* **5\.** One of your Elite models gains 1 XP and you earn 1 Glory.  
* **6\.** Your Warband permanently gains one Exploration Skill of your choice.

*Dishonor*  
Whenever you suffer Dishonor, ignore the next 1 Glory Point you would earn for every incomplete Imperative in the failed Endeavor. This resets rather than stacking if you fail another.

### Adeptus Custodes Patrons

Your patron can be the Captain-General, or the Indomitus Crusade Shared Patron.

#### Patron: Captain-General

*Or a similar high ranking member of the Adeptus Custodes.*

* **Champion of the Imperium.** If any ally within 1” of this model is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to this model instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit this model.  
* **Impregnable Mind.** This model cannot be forced to move.  
* **Master Of Martial Strategy.** After you activate this model, you decide the next 3 models to activate, following the normal limits (i.e. the second will usually be your own model again). If you choose a model in a Fireteam, the model's owner decides if it will activate as a Fireteam or individually.  
* **Peerless Warrior.** This model has \+1 INJURY DICE with all attacks.  
* **Radiant Mantle.** All attacks made against this model have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Superior Creation (non-Psykana Only).** This model has NEGATE FIRE, NEGATE GAS, and NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

### Adeptus Custodes Unique Battlekit

#### Adeptus Custodes Ranged Weapons

* **Adrastus Bolt Caliver.** TWO-HANDED, Scope  
  * Bolter. 30”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL  
  * Disintegrator. 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR  
* **Balistus Grenade Launcher.** 18”, BLAST 2”, ASSAULT, SHRAPNEL, THROWN.  
* **Kinetic Destroyer.** 12”, ASSAULT, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, PISTOL, Scope  
* **Salvo Launcher.** 24”, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, HEAVY  
* **Twin Las-Pulsar.** 24”, \+1 DICE, \+1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY  
* **Twin Adrathic Destructor.** 18”, \+1 DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR at Short Range  
* **Vertus Hurricane Bolter.** 18”, AUTOMATIC 2, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED

#### Adeptus Custodes Melee Weapons

* **Executioner Greatblade.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, another \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, TWO-HANDED  
* **Interceptor Lance.** Melee, BLOCK, \+1 INJURY DICE, additional \+1 INJURY DICE if the wielder Charged during this Activation, ARMOUR PIERCING 1  
* **Misericordia.** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR of Down targets  
* **Solerite Power Gauntlet.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, IGNORE ARMOUR, HEAVY  
* **Solerite Power Talon.** Melee, \+2 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, CRITICAL, HEAVY, RISKY  
* **Tarsis Buckler.** Melee, HELD. Melee attacks have \-1 DICE to Hit the wielder.  
* **Vaultswords.** Melee, CUMBERSOME, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED  
  * Behemor: \+2 INJURY DICE  
  * Hurricanus: CLEAVE 2  
  * Victus: IGNORE ARMOUR

#### Adeptus Custodes Combined Weapons

* **Achillus Dreadspear.** BLOCK, HEAVY, HELD, Shield Combo  
  * Strike: Melee, CUMBERSOME, \+1 INJURY DICE, another \+1 INJURY DICE if the wielder Charged during this Activation, IGNORE ARMOUR  
  * Shoot: 12”, \+2 INJURY DICE at Short Range  
* **Adrasite Spear.** BLOCK, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED, HELD, Shield Combo  
  * Strike: Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, CUMBERSOME  
  * Shoot: 18”, ASSAULT, IGNORE ARMOUR at Short Range  
* **Castellan Axe.** HEAVY, TWO-HANDED, HELD, Shield Combo  
  * Strike: Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, CUMBERSOME  
  * Shoot: 24”, \+1 INJURY DICE  
* **Galatus Warblade.** HEAVY, TWO-HANDED, HELD  
  * Strike: Melee, CRITICAL, \+1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR  
  * Shoot: 10”, AUTOMATIC 2, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE, HEAVY  
* **Guardian Spear.** BLOCK, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED, HELD, Shield Combo  
  * Strike: Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, CUMBERSOME  
  * Shoot: 24”, \+1 INJURY DICE  
* **Pyrithite Spear.** BLOCK, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED, HELD, Shield Combo  
  * Strike: Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, CUMBERSOME  
  * Shoot: 12”, \+1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, RISKY  
* **Sentinel Blade.** HEAVY, TWO-HANDED, HELD, Shield Combo  
  * Strike: Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN HAND ONLY  
  * Shoot: 12”, \+1 INJURY DICE, ASSAULT

#### Adeptus Custodes Armour

* **Aquilon Armour.** \-3 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY. Model gains the DEEP STRIKE, STRONG, and VEHICLE Keywords. Aquilon Armour cannot be combined with a Jump Pack or Dawneagle Jetbike.  
* **Auramite Armour.** \-3 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY.  
* **Praesidium Shield (Shield-Captain Only).** HELD, COVER, HEAVY, the first \-1 of the bearer’s armour has IMPERVIOUS. Counts as a Shield for the purposes of the Shield Combo property.

#### Adeptus Custodes Equipment

* **Amelioration Pail.** As an Action with no roll required, the equipped model can consume the pail to remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from itself.  
* **Dawneagle Jetbike.** The equipped model is mounted on a jet bike. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the VEHICLE Keyword, a movement speed of 10”/Flying, but has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Built-In Weapon and Turbo-Boost abilities. This battlekit cannot be taken along with Aquilon Armour.  
  * **Built-In Weapon.** The rider can be equipped with up to 1 additional non-Grenade ranged weapon, which does not take any hands, and can be used alongside any other ranged weapon when the rider takes the Shoot Action.  
  * **Turbo-Boost.** The rider has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Vexilla.** HELD. As long as the wielder is not Down or Out of Action, you automatically pass all Morale Tests.

### Adeptus Custodes Campaign Shop

During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.

* **Anathematic Diadem (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, ANATHEMA Only).** Enemies within 12” of the equipped model have \-1 DICE on all PSYCHIC Success Rolls, including attacks. In addition, the equipped model can Deny the Witch as if it had PSYKER 1\.  
* **Apollonian Spear (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** BLOCK, HEAVY, Injury rolls cannot benefit from any \-DICE, TWO-HANDED, Shield Combo  
  * Strike: Melee, CUMBERSOME, CLEAVE 2  
  * Shoot: 18”, ARMOUR PIERCING 2  
* **Arae-Shrike (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** Enemy models must be set up at least 16” away from this model when using the DEEP STRIKE or INFILTRATOR Keywords. In addition, enemy models within 12” of the equipped model cannot target or affect any of their allies with their abilities or psychic powers if those allies are further than 1” away.  
* **Auriferous Orbs (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** 8”, ASSAULT, BLAST 3”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, IGNORE ARMOUR, THROWN, on a hit, a target suffers \-1 DICE to all of its attacks during its next Activation.  
* **Auspice Mantle (6 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** Ranged attacks cannot be made against the equipped model if the attacker is more than 12” away from it.  
* **Epoch Auspice (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** The equipped model and each ally within 3” of it has the STEALTH Keyword.  
* **Lucent Aureole (5 Glory, LIMIT: 1, non-PSYKANA Only).** The first \-2 of the equipped model’s Armour has IMPERVIOUS.  
* **Mortis Gyre (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** Injury rolls caused by melee weapons the equipped model wields cannot benefit from \-DICE.  
* **Sword of Oblivion (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1).**  Melee, CRITICAL, \+1 INJURY DICE, another \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, TWO-HANDED  
* **Twilight Pallium (9 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** As an Action with a Success Roll, the equipped model can teleport to a location anywhere within 1” of any enemy model on the battlefield. This counts as a Charge Action for the purposes of Action limitations and the ASSAULT Keyword, and once it is successful, it cannot be used again during that battle.

### Adeptus Custodes Elites

#### 0-1 Shield-Captain (125 credits \+50 or 70 for armour)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Shield-Captain | 6”/Infantry | \+3 | \+3 | \-3 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Shield-Captain must be equipped with Auramite Armour or Aquilon Armour, included in its cost and statistics above. Otherwise, it can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Custodes Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Aegis of the Emperor.** The Shield-Captain treats any Out of Action result from the Injury Roll Table as a Down result instead unless the result was caused by a Bloodbath (in which case its TOUGH Keyword still applies). However, you cannot remove BLOOD MARKERS from the Shield-Captain except via an Amelioration Pail (the opposing player can use them normally).  
* **Master of Stances.** When the Shield-Captain makes an attack, that attack has your choice of the ARMOUR PIERCING 1 Keyword, stacking with all other sources of ARMOUR PIERCING, or the CRITICAL Keyword.  
* **Stand Vigil.** The Shield-Captain treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH or Aegis of the Emperor.  
* **Strategic Mastery.** As an Action with no roll, choose any one model the Chield-Captain can see, ally or enemy, that has not yet activated this Turn. The Shield-Captain’s Activation ends and that model’s Activation begins.

**Keywords**  
CUSTODES, ELITE, LARGE, LEADER, STRONG, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Blade Champion (85 credits \+50 or 70 for armour)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Blade Champion | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+3 | \-3 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Blade Champion must be equipped with Auramite Armour or Aquilon Armour, included in its cost and statistics above. Otherwise, it can be equipped with any melee weapons or equipment from the Adeptus Custodes Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Aegis of the Emperor.** The Blade Champion treats any Out of Action result from the Injury Roll Table as a Down result instead unless the result was caused by a Bloodbath. However, you cannot remove BLOOD MARKERS from the Blade Champion except via an Amelioration Pail (the opposing player can use them normally).  
* **Martial Inspiration.** Melee attacks made by the Blade Champion and any of its allies within 3” of it have the CRITICAL Keyword.  
* **Stand Vigil.** The Blade Champion treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with Aegis of the Emperor.  
* **Swift Onslaught.** Whenever the Blade Champion Charges, roll 2D6 instead of 1D6 and then add the highest of the two dice to its charge move.

**Keywords**  
CUSTODES, ELITE, LARGE, STRONG

#### 0-1 Knight-Centura (75 credits \+40 for armour)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Knight-Centura | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Knight-Centura must be equipped with Power Armour, included in the cost and its statistics above. Otherwise, it can be equipped with any weapons or equipment from the Adeptus Custodes Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Corner the Quarry.** Enemies in close combat with the Knight-Centura cannot Retreat.  
* **Daughter of the Abyss.** Injury rolls with the PSYCHIC or IGNORE ARMOUR Keyword have \-1 INJURY DICE against the Knight-Centura.  
* **Deny the Witch.** The Knight-Centura can Deny the Witch as if it had PSYKER 1\.  
* **Seeker’s Instincts.** The Knight-Centura has \+1 DICE to all Dash actions.

**Keywords**  
ANATHEMA, CUSTODES, ELITE, FEAR

### Adeptus Custodes Troops

#### Anathema Psykana (55 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Anathema Psykana | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Anathema Psykana can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Custodes Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Daughter of the Abyss.** Injury rolls with the PSYCHIC or IGNORE ARMOUR Keyword have \-1 INJURY DICE against the Anathema Psykana.  
* **Deft Parry.** Melee attacks made against the Anathema Psykana have \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Upgrades**

* **Witchseeker.** Up to half of your Anathema Psykana, rounded down, can be upgraded to Witchseekers for \+10 credits each.  
  * **Deny the Witch.** The Witchseeker can Deny the Witch as if it had PSYKER 1\.  
  * **Sanctified Flames.** The Witchseeker’s ranged attacks have the FIRE Keyword.

**Keywords**  
ANATHEMA, CUSTODES, FEAR

#### 0-5 Custodian Guard (85 credits \+50 for armour)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Custodian Guard | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-3 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Custodian Guard must be equipped with Auramite Armour, included in the cost and its statistics above. Otherwise, it can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Custodes Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Aegis of the Emperor.** The Custodian Guard treats any Out of Action result from the Injury Roll Table as a Down result instead unless the result was caused by a Bloodbath. However, you cannot remove BLOOD MARKERS from the Custodian Guard except via an Amelioration Pail (the opposing player can use them normally).  
* **Stand Vigil.** The Custodian Guard treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with Aegis of the Emperor.

**Upgrades**  
A Custodian Guard can be upgraded with only one of the following.

* **Allarus Custodian.** Up to 2 Custodian Guards can be upgraded to Allarus Custodians for \+15 credits each, granting them the following abilities:  
  * **From Golden Light.** The Allarus Custodian has the DEEP STRIKE Keyword.  
  * **Slayer of Tyrants.** The Allarus Custodian has \+1 INJURY DICE with attacks made against enemy ELITE models.  
* **Custodian Warden.** Up to 2 Custodian Guards can be upgraded to Custodian Wardens for \+10 credits each, granting them the NEGATE FEAR Keyword and the following ability:  
  * **Living Fortress.** The first \-1 of the Custodian Warden’s Armour gains IMPERVIOUS.  
* **Venatari Custodian.** Up to 2 Custodian Guards can be upgraded to Venatari Custodian for \+5 credits each, allowing them to use Jump Packs and Tarsis Bucklers, and granting them the SKIRMISHER Keyword while wearing a Jump Pack.

**Keywords**  
CUSTODES, LARGE, STRONG

#### 0-1 Aquilon Terminator (90 credits \+70 for armour)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Aquilon  Custodian | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+3 | \-3 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Aquilon Custodian must be equipped with Aquilon Armour, included in the cost and its statistics above. Otherwise, it can be equipped with any weapons or equipment from the Adeptus Custodes Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Aegis of the Emperor.** The Aquilon Terminator treats any Out of Action result from the Injury Roll Table as a Down result instead unless the result was caused by a Bloodbath. However, you cannot remove BLOOD MARKERS from the Aquilon Terminator except via an Amelioration Pail (the opposing player can use them normally).  
* **Stand Vigil.** The Aquilon Terminator treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with Aegis of the Emperor.

**Keywords**  
CUSTODES, DEEP STRIKE, LARGE, STRONG, VEHICLE

#### 0-1 Contemptor Dreadnought (210 credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Contemptor Dreadnought | 6”/Infantry | \+3 | \+3 | \-3 | 60mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Contemptor Dreadnought is equipped with heavy armour plating, included in its cost and its statistics above. Instead of normal hand limits, the Contemptor Dreadnought can be equipped with one of the following:

* One Galatus Warblade  
* Up to two other TWO-HANDED weapons  
* A single other TWO-HANDED weapon and a Praesidium Shield.

It must still obey the CUMBERSOME Keyword when fighting in melee. If it is equipped with only ranged weapons, it also counts as being equipped with a Close Combat Weapon.

**Abilities**

* **Dread Foe.** When this model successfully Charges one or more enemy models, those models must roll on the Injury table.  
* **Dreadnought Armaments.** While equipped with two ranged weapons, the Contemptor Deadnought can make a Shoot Action with both of them during its Activation.  
* **Unyielding Ancient.** Injury rolls made against the Contemptor Dreadnought have \-1 INJURY DICE.

**Keywords**  
CUSTODES, FEAR, LARGE, NO PROMOTION, STRONG, TOUGH, VEHICLE

### Adeptus Custodes Mercenaries

You can hire the following mercenaries.

#### Assassinorum Mercenaries

**Max 1 per Warband:**

* 0-1 Adamus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Callidus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Culexus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Eversor Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Vanus Infocyte (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Venenum Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Vindicare Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)

#### Ecclesiarchy Mercenaries

**Max 2 per Warband:**

* 0-2 Arco-Flagellant (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Death Cult Assassin (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ministorum Priest (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ministorum Vindictor (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Salvationist (Cost: 2 Glory)

#### Law Mercenaries

* 0-1 Arbites Enforcer (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Hardcase Cyber Mastiff (Cost: 3 Glory)

#### Mars Mercenaries

* 0-1 Combat Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Gun Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Magos Errant (Cost: 4 Glory)

#### Space Marine Mercenaries

* 0-1 Lone Primaris Marine (Cost: 4 Glory)

**Max 1 per Warband:**

* 0-1 Black Templar Crusader (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Blood Angels Sanguinary Guard (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Dark Angel Knight (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Grey Knight Paladin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Imperial Fist Heavy Gunner (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Iron Hands Heavy Gunner (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Raven Guard Corvus Marine (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Space Wolves Wulfen (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 White Scars Outrider (Cost: 6 Glory)

#### Other Imperial Mercenaries

* 0-1 Astropath (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Canid Companion (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Lone Inquisitor (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Navigator (Cost: 3 Glory)
